titles.en: Chapter 31 – Divorce of the one who conceals her menstruation
Chapter 31 – Divorce of the one who conceals her menstruation

segments: كَتَبْتُ إِلَى الرَّجُلِ ( عليه السلام ) أَسْأَلُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ لَهُ امْرَأَةٌ مِنْ نِسَاءِ هَؤُلَاءِ الْعَامَّةِ وَ أَرَادَ أَنْ يُطَلِّقَهَا وَ قَدْ كَتَمَتْ حَيْضَهَا وَ طُهْرَهَا مَخَافَةَ الطَّلَاقِ فَكَتَبَ ( عليه السلام ) يَعْتَزِلُهَا ثَلَاثَةَ أَشْهُرٍ وَ يُطَلِّقُهَا .
arabic.text: كَتَبْتُ إِلَى الرَّجُلِ ( عليه السلام ) أَسْأَلُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ لَهُ امْرَأَةٌ مِنْ نِسَاءِ هَؤُلَاءِ الْعَامَّةِ وَ أَرَادَ أَنْ يُطَلِّقَهَا وَ قَدْ كَتَمَتْ حَيْضَهَا وَ طُهْرَهَا مَخَافَةَ الطَّلَاقِ فَكَتَبَ ( عليه السلام ) يَعْتَزِلُهَا ثَلَاثَةَ أَشْهُرٍ وَ يُطَلِّقُهَا .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Abdullah Bin Ja’far, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Ali Bin Kaysan who said,

‘I wrote to Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> asking him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who had a wife from the women of these general Muslims, and he wanted to divorce her, and she had concealed her menstruation, and her purity fearing the divorce. So he<sup>asws</sup> wrote: ‘He should retire her for three months and divorce her’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Abdullah Bin Ja’far, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Ali Bin Kaysan who said,

‘I wrote to Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> asking him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who had a wife from the women of these general Muslims, and he wanted to divorce her, and she had concealed her menstruation, and her purity fearing the divorce. So he<sup>asws</sup> wrote: ‘He should retire her for three months and divorce her’.

segments: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from ‘Abd Allah ibn Ja‘far from al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn Kaysan who has said the following: “I once wrote to the man, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and asked about the case of a man who has a wife who is of ‘Ammah (the general population). He wants to divorce her but she hides her Hayd (menses) and Hayd (menses)-free period for fear of divorce. He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, wrote, ‘He can hold back from her for three months, then divorce her.”’
en.sarwar.text: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from ‘Abd Allah ibn Ja‘far from al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn Kaysan who has said the following: “I once wrote to the man, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and asked about the case of a man who has a wife who is of ‘Ammah (the general population). He wants to divorce her but she hides her Hayd (menses) and Hayd (menses)-free period for fear of divorce. He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, wrote, ‘He can hold back from her for three months, then divorce her.”’

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ كَيْسَانَ قَالَ
